title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies:
HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies!
